creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

Thanks for that info... can you help me understand how I could find some of this info myself (and make use of the provided info)?

For beefy16.nyi.freebsd.org I get "DNS address could not be found." It looks like it has an IPv6 address, but not an IPv4, so I'm not sure how I can follow that link.

When I search ci.freebsd.org for vscode, there are no results. Same on pkg-status.

So, I'm not sure how to check the build status of a particular package, or even make use of the provided links.

Got any pointers for me?
